name: multipart-no-boundary
description: Multipart message missing required boundary parameter (RFC 2046 section 5.1.1)
input:
From: sender@example.com
To: recipient@example.com
Subject: Missing Boundary
Date: Mon, 27 Jan 2026 10:00:00 +0000
Message-ID: <nobound-123@example.com>
MIME-Version: 1.0
Content-Type: multipart/mixed

This should fail.
expectedError: multipart content type missing boundary parameter
